title: Geographic Health: Instance Detail with Coordinates
description: Shows individual instance health status with geographic coordinates, cloud provider, region, role, and key metrics. Each row represents the latest heartbeat from an instance — suitable for map pin placement.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Multicloud Health Logs' | stats count as heartbeats by 'Host Name', 'Cloud Provider', 'Latitude', 'Longitude' | sort 'Cloud Provider'
